summary: Tested new FinanceReports feature: separate /financeiro and /financeiro/relatorios routes, and 3 new backend report endpoints. All working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - no data in DB, all values show R$ 0,00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature fully working. /financeiro shows Finance.js (Gestão Financeira with transaction table). /financeiro/relatorios shows FinanceReports.js (Relatórios Financeiros with monthly bar chart, pie charts for category/payment). All 3 new backend endpoints (/api/finance/reports/monthly, /api/finance/reports/by-category, /api/finance/reports/by-payment) return 200 with session auth. No transactions in DB so all values are 0 but structure is correct.
